title: Frontend Developer
description: Frontend developers build the part of websites that users see and interact with. They focus on design, layout, and functionality to create a smooth user experience.
projectIdeas: Landing page for a small business

title: Backend Developer
description: Backend developers work on the server side of websites and apps. They manage databases, servers, and application logic that powers the frontend.

title: Data Analyst
description: Data analysts study and interpret data to help businesses make informed decisions. They create charts and reports to explain trends and insights.

title: UX Designer
description: UX designers focus on making products easy and enjoyable to use. They research user needs and design interfaces that solve problems effectively.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Cybersecurity analysts protect computer systems from hackers and threats. They monitor systems, identify vulnerabilities, and implement security measures.
projectIdeas: Monitor a small network for threats

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Mobile app developers create applications for smartphones and tablets. They focus on functionality, usability, and performance for mobile users.

title: AI/ML Enthusiast
description: AI/ML enthusiasts work with algorithms that allow computers to learn from data. They create models that can predict outcomes or recognize patterns.

title: Digital Marketer
description: Digital marketers help businesses reach customers online. They create campaigns, optimize websites, and analyze performance to improve results.

title: Game Developer
description: Game developers design and build video games. They combine coding, art, and storytelling to create fun and interactive experiences.

title: Business Analyst
description: Business analysts study processes and data to help companies improve. They suggest solutions to increase efficiency and profitability.

title: Cloud Engineer
description: Cloud engineers design and maintain cloud systems for businesses. They manage servers, storage, and services hosted online.
projectIdeas: Set up a cloud storage system

title: Content Creator
description: Content creators produce articles, videos, and posts for online platforms. They engage audiences with informative or entertaining material.
